sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ أَمْسِ لِشِرَاءِ بَعْضِ الدَّوَاءِ لِلصُّدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer sam otišao u apoteku da kupim lijek protiv glavobolje.
sentences.translationEn: I went to the pharmacy yesterday to buy some medicine for a headache.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ لِي الصَّيْدَلَانِيُّ كَيْفِيَّةَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الدَّوَاءِ بِشَكْلٍ صَحِيحٍ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mi je objasnio kako da pravilno koristim lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist explained to me how to use the medicine correctly.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ أَتَّبِعَ تَعْلِيمَاتِ الطَّبِيبِ بِدِقَّةٍ لِأَتَعَافَى سَرِيعًا.
sentences.translation: Moram se strogo pridržavati ljekarskih uputa kako bih se brzo oporavio.
sentences.translationEn: I must follow the doctor's instructions carefully to recover quickly.
